creator: yokota@res.otaru-uc.ac.jp
text:
These are font bundles for the Japanese Wadalab fonts which work with the
CJK (cjk) package.

All subfonts now have glyph names compliant to the Adobe Glyph List,
making ToUnicode CMaps in PDF documents (created automatically by dvipdfmx)
work correctly.

All font bundles contain virtual Unicode subfonts.

WWW: http://www.ctan.org/tex-archive/fonts/wadalab/

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.77
